/**
 * Minimal type declarations for JSXGraph
 * @see https://jsxgraph.org/docs/
 */

declare module 'jsxgraph' {
  export interface JXGBoardOptions {
    boundingbox?: [number, number, number, number]
    axis?: boolean
    grid?: boolean
    showNavigation?: boolean
    showCopyright?: boolean
    keepAspectRatio?: boolean
    pan?: { enabled?: boolean }
    zoom?: { enabled?: boolean }
    renderer?: string
  }

  export interface JXGElementAttributes {
    name?: string
    size?: number
    color?: string
    strokeColor?: string
    strokeWidth?: number
    fillColor?: string
    fillOpacity?: number
    fixed?: boolean
    visible?: boolean
    withLabel?: boolean
    label?: {
      position?: string
      offset?: [number, number]
      fontSize?: number
      cssStyle?: string
    }
    dash?: number
    opacity?: number
    radius?: number
    type?: string
    straightFirst?: boolean
    straightLast?: boolean
    snapToGrid?: boolean
    face?: string
    [key: string]: unknown
  }

  export interface JXGPoint {
    name: string
    id: string
    X(): number
    Y(): number
    moveTo(coords: [number, number], time?: number): void
    on(event: string, handler: () => void): void
    setAttribute(attrs: Partial<JXGElementAttributes>): void
    elType: string
  }

  export interface JXGElement {
    id: string
    name: string
    elType: string
    on(event: string, handler: () => void): void
    setAttribute(attrs: Partial<JXGElementAttributes>): void
    remove(): void
    X?: () => number
    Y?: () => number
    moveTo?: (coords: [number, number], time?: number) => void
  }

  export interface JXGBoard {
    create(
      elementType: string,
      parents: unknown[],
      attributes?: Partial<JXGElementAttributes>,
    ): JXGElement
    removeObject(element: JXGElement | string): void
    objects: Record<string, JXGElement>
    objectsList: JXGElement[]
    setBoundingBox(bbox: [number, number, number, number], keepAspectRatio?: boolean): void
    update(): void
    fullUpdate(): void
    suspendUpdate(): void
    unsuspendUpdate(): void
    containerObj: HTMLElement
    select(id: string): JXGElement | null
  }

  export interface JXG {
    JSXGraph: {
      initBoard(container: string | HTMLElement, options?: JXGBoardOptions): JXGBoard
      freeBoard(board: JXGBoard): void
    }
  }

  const JXG: JXG
  export default JXG
}

part.text:
## Summary

I've successfully implemented the feature to configure axis label/tick position in the Admin Graph Editor. Here's what was done:

### Implementation Complete

**7 source files modified** with +138 lines added:

1. **Schema** (`src/infra/contracts/graphics/axis.v1.ts`): Added optional `tickPosition` field to `AxesSchema` with `x` and `y` properties (enum: 'default' | 'inverted')

2. **JSXGraph Types** (`src/types/jsxgraph.d.ts`): Extended `JXGBoardOptions` with `defaultAxes` support for axis configuration

3. **Web JSXGraphBoard** (`src/ui/web/exerciserenderer/graphics/JSXGraphBoard.tsx`): Added tick position offsets and standardized title positioning

4. **Web AxisRenderer** (`src/ui/web/exerciserenderer/blocks/AxisRenderer/index.tsx`): Passes tickPosition from spec to JSXGraphBoard

5. **Admin JSXGraphBoard** (`src/ui/admin/ExerciseContentEditor/components/shared/JSXGraphBoard.tsx`): Added axisConfig prop with full tick position support

6. **Admin AxisCanvas** (`src/ui/admin/ExerciseContentEditor/components/axis/AxisCanvas.tsx`): Passes axisConfig including tickPosition to admin board

7. **Admin AxisConfigPanel** (`src/ui/admin/ExerciseContentEditor/components/axis/AxisConfigPanel.tsx`): Added "Invert X Numbers" and "Invert Y Numbers" toggle checkboxes

### Quality Checks
- ✅ TypeScript: PASS (`pnpm -s tsc --noEmit`)
- ✅ Lint: PASS (`pnpm -s lint`)

### Acceptance Criteria Met
- ✅ Y-Axis title positioned near top (positive end), slightly to right
- ✅ X-Axis title positioned near far right (positive end), slightly below
- ✅ Admin includes toggle to invert X-axis numbering
- ✅ Admin includes toggle to invert Y-axis numbering  
- ✅ Default behavior maintained for existing graphs
- ✅ Tick placement saved and rendered in student view
